debug_info.goal:
a : ℕ+ → ℤ
hi : ∀ (j : ℕ+), 1 ≤ a j ∧ a j ≤ 2015
hii : ∀ (l k : ℕ+), 1 ≤ k ∧ k < l → ↑↑k + a k ≠ ↑↑l + a l
⊢ ∃ b N, ∀ (m n : ℕ+), m < n ∧ N ≤ m → |∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - ↑↑b)| ≤ 1007 ^ 2

failed_attempts:
use 1008, 1
  intro m n ⟨hmn, _⟩
  have h1 : ∀ j, a j - 1008 ≥ -1007 := fun j => by linarith [(hi j).1]
  have h2 : ∀ j, a j - 1008 ≤ 1007 := fun j => by linarith [(hi j).2]
  by_cases hemp : (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).Nonempty
  · have hcard : (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card ≤ n - m := by
      simp only [Finset.card_Icc]
      omega
    have hsum_lower : ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - 1008) ≥ 
        -1007 * (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card := by
      calc ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - 1008) 
          ≥ ∑ _j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (-1007 : ℤ) := 
            Finset.sum_le_sum (fun j _ => h1 j)
        _ = -1007 * (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card := by ring_nf; simp [Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul]
    have hsum_upper : ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - 1008) ≤ 
        1007 * (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card := by
      calc ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - 1008) 
          ≤ ∑ _j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (1007 : ℤ) := 
            Finset.sum_le_sum (fun j _ => h2 j)
        _ = 1007 * (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card := by ring_nf; simp [Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul]
    rw [abs_le]
    constructor
    · calc -1007^2 = -1007 * 1007 := by ring
        _ ≤ -1007 * (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card := by nlinarith [Finset.card_pos.mpr hemp]
        _ ≤ ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - 1008) := hsum_lower
        _ = ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - ↑↑(1008 : ℕ+)) := by norm_cast
    · calc ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - ↑↑(1008 : ℕ+)) 
          = ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - 1008) := by norm_cast
        _ ≤ 1007 * (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card := hsum_upper
        _ ≤ 1007 * 1007 := by nlinarith [Finset.card_pos.mpr hemp]
        _ = 1007^2 := by ring
  · simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hemp
    simp [hemp]

use 1008, 1
  intro m n ⟨hmn, _⟩
  by_cases h : (m + 1 : ℕ+) ≤ n
  · have card_bound : (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card ≤ n - m := by
      simp only [Finset.card_Icc, PNat.sub_coe]
      omega
    have sum_bound : ∀ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, |a j - 1008| ≤ 1007 := by
      intro j _
      have := hi j
      omega
    calc |∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - ↑↑1008)| 
        ≤ ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, |a j - 1008| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
      _ ≤ ∑ _ ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, 1007 := Finset.sum_le_sum sum_bound
      _ = 1007 * (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n).card := by ring_nf; simp [Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
      _ ≤ 1007 * 1007 := by nlinarith [Finset.card_Icc (m + 1) n, hmn]
      _ = 1007 ^ 2 := by ring
  · simp only [not_le] at h
    have : Finset.Icc (m + 1) n = ∅ := by
      ext x
      simp only [Finset.mem_Icc, Finset.not_mem_empty, iff_false, not_and, not_le]
      intro hx
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le h hx
    simp [this]

    calc |∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - 1008)|
        ≤ ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, |a j - 1008| := Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
      _ ≤ ∑ _ ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (1007 : ℤ) := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun j _ => this j)
      _ ≤ 1007 ^ 2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const]; nlinarith [Finset.card_Icc (m + 1) n]⟩
